parameters.jsCode:
const prep = $('Prepare Files').first().json;
const ghBase = `https://github.com/${prep.repo}/blob/main/`;

return [{ json: {
  status: 'DELIVERED',
  course_id:            prep.course_id,
  target_course_id:     prep.target_course_id,
  direction:            prep.direction,
  date:                 prep.date,
  score_total:          prep.score_total,
  structural_integrity: prep.structural_integrity,
  pending_phase2_counts: prep.pending_counts || {},
  deliverables: {
    html_github:      ghBase + prep.htmlPath,
    log_github:       ghBase + prep.logPath,
    tm_patch:         ghBase + prep.tmPath,
    review_md:        ghBase + prep.mdPath,
    todo_graphics:    ghBase + prep.graphicsPath,
    todo_links:       ghBase + prep.linksPath,
    todo_videos:      ghBase + prep.videosPath
  },
  next_steps: [
    'Import review .md into Notion for human QA',
    'Phase 2: localize static_graphics with A8 using todo_graphics CSV',
    'Phase 2: update OC course links once target courses are published',
    'Phase 2: localize video captions with A7',
    'Merge TM patch CSV into domain translation memory after validation',
    'Re-inject HTML under target course ID on OC platform'
  ]
}}];

body.message: =docs: add static graphics todo for {{$('Prepare Files').item.json.target_course_id}}
=docs: add external links todo for {{$('Prepare Files').item.json.target_course_id}}
